name: crud-app-node
description: Node.js conversion of Spring Boot CRUD app

scripts.postinstall: rm -rf node_modules/@azure/msal-node node_modules/@microsoft/microsoft-graph-client node_modules/isomorphic-fetch || rmdir /s /q node_modules\@azure\msal-node node_modules\@microsoft\microsoft-graph-client node_modules\isomorphic-fetch 2>nul || echo 'Cleanup complete'
